summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 P0 features: (1) AdminVerificationTab in admin panel Ověření tab, (2) handleUpdateVerificationStatus / handleSetSpecializationLabel in useAdminData.js, (3) Specializace inline edit in AdminUsersTab.js. All backend tests pass (14/14). All UI flows verified and working correctly end-to-end.

issues: Verification tab pending badge (amber dot with count) only appears AFTER the tab is clicked for the first time, because fetchVerificationRequests() is only triggered via onClick on the tab trigger. On initial admin page load, verificationRequests=[] so no badge shows. Minor UX issue - admin needs to click tab to see pending count.

verifySubmitted state is local (not persisted). After page reload, button shows 'Požádat o ověření' again even if user has an active pending request. User can click and attempt to submit again, which shows a toast error (backend 400: 'Již máte otevřenou žádost'). Not a critical bug but minor UX friction.

action_items: MINOR: Consider loading verificationRequests count on initial admin page load (not just on tab click) so badge appears without clicking the tab first. Could add a lightweight count endpoint or include in initial fetchAll.
MINOR: Consider persisting 'submitted verification request' state (localStorage or API check) so profile page button stays disabled after page reload if user has a pending request.
critical_code_review_comments: All three P0 features implemented correctly: AdminVerificationTab connected in AdminPage.js with tab trigger (data-testid='verification-tab-trigger') and content (data-testid='verification-tab-content').
useAdminData.js: verificationRequests state, fetchVerificationRequests, handleUpdateVerificationStatus, handleSetSpecializationLabel all implemented and exported correctly.
AdminUsersTab.js: Specializace row with inline edit (edit/save/cancel) correctly gated to ['specialist', 'lawyer'] roles only. data-testids present for all interactive elements.

Backend routes complete: POST /api/verification-requests, GET /api/admin/verification-requests, PUT /api/admin/verification-requests/{req_id}/status, PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id}/specialization-label all return correct status codes.
Duplicate pending request prevention works (400 returned if user already has pending request).
Role validation on specialization-label endpoint: returns 400 for non-specialist/lawyer users, 404 for nonexistent users.
seed_data_creation: Created two test users: TEST_verif_user@bloom.cz and TEST_verif_reviewer@bloom.cz. Created and processed several verification requests during testing. Set specialization_label='plastický chirurg' for M_S_(Marta) specialist user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 P0 features implemented and verified. Key testing notes: (1) Lotus intro animation takes 3.8s - MUST wait 4500ms before filling form inputs on fresh page load. (2) Admin token key in login response is 'token' (not 'access_token'). (3) Community gate input is actually the login form password field (no separate community gate component visible in browser). (4) Use data-testid selectors: login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-btn, verification-tab-trigger, verification-tab, verify-mark-reviewed-{id}, verify-reject-{id}, spec-label-edit-{id}, spec-label-input-{id}, spec-label-save-{id}, spec-label-value-{id}, request-verification-btn, verify-submit-btn.
